---
title: "Comparing fod web model results from different sites"
author: "Connor Shea"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output: 
  #html_document: 
  bookdown::html_document2:  
    self-contained: yes
    theme: cerulean #paper #cosmo #journal #readable
    toc: true
    smooth_scroll: true
    toc_depth: 3
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
    fig_caption: yes
    code_folding: hide
bibliography: Utilities/MesoPelaZooAA.bib
csl: Utilities/LnO.csl
link-citations: yes
---

```{r setup, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
## This chunk sets up a working directory, loads packages, defines a couple functions, and sets global chunk options for the .Rmd document

# clean up
rm(list=ls()) 

# fresh start? If FALSE (select 2 in hard bracket), will only rerun a chunk if
# changes are detected within the text of that chunk.
rmCache <- c(TRUE, FALSE)[2] 
tfn <- knitr::current_input()              # name of this file
tfn <- substr(tfn, 1, nchar(tfn)-4)        # Remove the ".Rmd"
tfn_cache <- paste0("Caches/", tfn, "_cache")         # Append "_cache" to it
tfn_figures <- paste0("Figures/", tfn, "_figures")         # Append "_figures" to it
if (rmCache) {
  if (file.exists(tfn_cache))                # If the cache exists...
    unlink(tfn_cache, recursive=TRUE)        # ...delete it.
}

## load packages quietly
shhh <- suppressPackageStartupMessages # It's a library, so shhh!
want <- c("knitr", 
          "readxl", # for reading xl files
          "MASS", # some statistics including lda
          "vegan", # ecology statistics
          "FactoMineR", # includes PCA function and utilities
          "factoextra", # extra utilities for FactoMineR
          "runjags", # To run Bayesian models
          "TruncatedDistributions", # To generate truncate porbability distributions
          "coda",  
          "DT", # makes nice sortable tables
          "openxlsx", # writes to .xlsx files
          "compositions", 
          "kableExtra",
          "zeallot", 
          "magrittr", 
          "DirichletReg", 
          "Ternary", 
          "png",
          "ggplot2",
          "ggpubr",
          "ggstance", # for vertical position dodging
          "ggtern", # for ternary plots in ggplot2
          "ggforce", # for specific extra plotting capabilities (facet_row())
          "plotly",
          "gridExtra",
          "graphics",
          "reshape2",
          "dplyr",
          "effects",
          "ggrepel",
          "scales"
          )
for (pkg in want) shhh(library(pkg, character.only=TRUE))

# set some chunk options
gr <- (1+sqrt(5))/2 # golden ratio, for figures
opts_chunk$set(comment="  ",
               # fig.asp=0.9/gr,       # <--- gr used here
               fig.align="center",
               # fig.width=5,
               out.width="95%",
               dpi=96, # set to 300 for important figures
               dev="png", # png, svg, pdf, jpg, tiff
               #echo=FALSE,
               cache=c(TRUE, FALSE)[2], 
               cache.path = paste0(tfn_cache,"/"),
               fig.path = paste0(tfn_figures,"/"),
               eval.after="fig.cap", # for dynamic captions
               collapse=TRUE
               )

## a couple of lines we need to run every time we knit
# setting the ggplot theme
theme_set(theme_classic2()+
            theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_line(colour = "grey95"),
                  panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey95")))
# defining a ggplot object to remove the x axis
no.x.axis <- theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
                   axis.text.x=element_blank(),
                   axis.ticks.x=element_blank())
# defining a ggplot object to remove the y axis
no.y.axis <- theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
                   axis.text.y=element_blank(),
                   axis.ticks.y=element_blank())

source("Functions/calcSDs.R")         # SDmean() and SDsum()
source("Functions/Post_Mode.R")       # post.mode()
```  

<!-- The following commands provide a shorthand for common symbols when used in math mode. -->

\newcommand{\um}{\ \mu \mathrm{ m}}
\newcommand{\mm}{\mathrm{\ mm}}
\newcommand{\m}{\mathrm{\ m}}
\newcommand{\N}{\mathrm{^{15}\text{N}}}
\newcommand{\dN}{\mathrm{\delta^{15}\text{N}}}
\newcommand{\dNAA}{\mathrm{\delta^{15}\text{N}_\text{AA}}}
\newcommand{\dNSAA}{\mathrm{\delta^{15}\text{N}_\text{SAA}}}
\newcommand{\dNTAA}{\mathrm{\delta^{15}\text{N}_\text{TAA}}}
\newcommand{\dNtr}{\mathrm{\delta^{15}\text{N}_\text{tr}}}
\newcommand{\dNsrc}{\mathrm{\delta^{15}\text{N}_\text{src}}}
\newcommand{\dNphe}{\mathrm{\delta^{15}N_{phe}}}
\newcommand{\dNthr}{\mathrm{\delta^{15}N_{thr}}}
\newcommand{\dNala}{\mathrm{\delta^{15}N_{ala}}}
\newcommand{\dNglx}{\mathrm{\delta^{15}N_{glx}}}
\newcommand{\dNThrPhe}{\mathrm{\delta^{15}N_{thr-phe}}}
\newcommand{\dNAlaPhe}{\mathrm{\delta^{15}N_{ala-phe}}}
\newcommand{\dNglxphe}{\mathrm{\delta^{15}N_{glx-phe}}}
\newcommand{\DN}{\mathrm{\Delta^{15}\text{N}}}
\newcommand{\DNAA}{\mathrm{\Delta^{15}\text{N}_\text{AA}}}
\newcommand{\C}{\mathrm{^{13}\text{C}}}
\newcommand{\dC}{\mathrm{\delta^{13}\text{C}}}
\newcommand{\dCAA}{\mathrm{\delta^{13}\text{C}_\text{AA}}}
\newcommand{\dCEAA}{\mathrm{\delta^{13}\text{C}_\text{EAA}}}
\newcommand{\dCNAA}{\mathrm{\delta^{13}\text{C}_\text{NAA}}}
\newcommand{\permil}{‰}
\newcommand{\degree}{°}
\newcommand{\TP}{\mathrm{TP}}
\newcommand{\TPala}{\mathrm{TP_{ala-phe}}}
\newcommand{\TPglx}{\mathrm{TP_{glx-phe}}}
\newcommand{\TPts}{\mathrm{TP_{tr-src}}}
\newcommand{\dTP}{\mathrm{\Delta TP_{ala-glx}}}

# Summary {-}  

Here we will be comparing the model results from all locations across the North Pacific. We will want to produce the following comparison plots.

    - Δ15N vaues at all sites
    - TP of 1-2 mm zooplankton at all sites
    - Mixing coefficients for 1-2 mm zooplankton st all sites
    - SAA vs depth plots at all sites
    
First we need to import the data from prior model runs.

```{r load-data, cache=TRUE}
path <- dirname(rstudioapi::getActiveDocumentContext()$path)

load(paste(path,"/Data/OMSM_posteriors_OSP.RData",sep=""))
posts.OSP <- posts
posts.long.OSP <- posts.long
data.all.OSP <- Data.all
# data.parts.OSP <- data.avg.parts
# data.parts.OSP$Location <- "OSP"
load(paste(path,"/Data/OMSM_posteriors_ALOHA-Summer.RData",sep=""))
posts.ALOHAS <- posts
posts.long.ALOHAS <- posts.long
data.all.ALOHAS <- subset(Data.all, Location == "ALOHA S")
# data.parts.ALOHAS <- data.avg.parts
# data.parts.ALOHAS$Location <- "ALOHA S"
load(paste(path,"/Data/OMSM_posteriors_ALOHA-Winter.RData",sep=""))
posts.ALOHAW <- posts
posts.long.ALOHAW <- posts.long
data.all.ALOHAW <- subset(Data.all, Location == "ALOHA W")
# data.parts.ALOHAW <- data.avg.parts
# data.parts.ALOHAW$Location <- "ALOHA W"
load(paste(path,"/Data/OMSM_posteriors_8N.RData",sep=""))
posts.8N <- posts
posts.long.8N <- posts.long
data.all.8N <- Data.all
# data.parts.8N <- data.avg.parts
# data.parts.8N$Location <- "8 N"
load(paste(path,"/Data/OMSM_posteriors_5N.RData",sep=""))
posts.5N <- posts
posts.long.5N <- posts.long
data.all.5N <- Data.all
# data.parts.5N <- data.avg.parts
# data.parts.5N$Location <- "5 N"
load(paste(path,"/Data/OMSM_posteriors_PAP.RData",sep=""))
posts.PAP <- posts
posts.long.PAP <- posts.long
data.all.PAP <- Data.all
# data.parts.5N <- data.avg.parts
# data.parts.5N$Location <- "5 N"

data.all <- 
  rbind(
    data.all.5N,
    data.all.8N,
    data.all.ALOHAS,
    data.all.ALOHAW,
    data.all.OSP,
    data.all.PAP
  )



# There are also some vectors we need to define
# Indicate the name of the column describing the organic matter source to which
# each sample belongs
# Source_Variable <- "Source"
# Indicate the names representing each possible source of organic matter in the
# order in which you would like the referenced
Sources <- c("Surface","Large","Small")

# List the name of any additional variables that should be stored for analysis
Additional_variables <- c("Location","Epoch","Event","Size","Depth","Type")

# variables <- c(Source_Variable, Additional_variables)
variables <- c(Additional_variables)


```

# Mixing Coefficient Depth Profiles {-}

First we'll try and make a full page figure of all model results from all locations.

```{r f_depth_profiles, DPI = 300, fig.width=8.5, fig.height=10, cache=FALSE}
# for (i in c("5 N","8 N","ALOHA S","ALOHA W","OSP")) {
# Making master data frames including all locations
# Also putting those into long format for plotting
sizes <- c("0.06-0.2 mm", "0.2-0.5 mm", "1-2 mm", "2-5 mm", ">5 mm",
           "Oithonid", "Harpactacoid", "Pleuromamma", "Peuromamma", "Ostracod", "Oncaeid", "Gaussia", "Chaetognath","Radiolarian", "Metridia", "Neocalanus","Gaetanus")
f.mode <-
  subset(
  bind_rows(
    posts.5N$f$mode[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.8N$f$mode[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.ALOHAS$f$mode[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.ALOHAW$f$mode[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.OSP$f$mode[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.PAP$f$mode[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")]),
  Size == "0.2-0.5 mm" | Size == "1-2 mm" | Size == "2-5 mm" | Size == ">5 mm")# & Location == i)
f.mode.long <-
  melt(f.mode,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "f")
f.mode.long$Size <- factor(f.mode.long$Size, levels = sizes)
f.HDI95 <-
  subset(
    bind_rows(
    posts.5N$f$HDI95[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.8N$f$HDI95[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.ALOHAS$f$HDI95[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.ALOHAW$f$HDI95[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.OSP$f$HDI95[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.PAP$f$HDI95[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")]),
  Size == "0.2-0.5 mm" | Size == "1-2 mm" | Size == "2-5 mm" | Size == ">5 mm")# & Location == i)
f.HDI95.long <-
  melt(f.HDI95,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "f")
f.HDI95.long$Size <- factor(f.HDI95.long$Size, levels = sizes)
f.HDI90 <-
  subset(
    bind_rows(
    posts.5N$f$HDI90[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.8N$f$HDI90[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.ALOHAS$f$HDI90[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.ALOHAW$f$HDI90[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.OSP$f$HDI90[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.PAP$f$HDI90[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")]),
  Size == "0.2-0.5 mm" | Size == "1-2 mm" | Size == "2-5 mm" | Size == ">5 mm")# & Location == i)
f.HDI90.long <-
  melt(f.HDI90,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "f")
f.HDI90.long$Size <- factor(f.HDI90.long$Size, levels = sizes)
f.HDI75 <-
  subset(
    bind_rows(
    posts.5N$f$HDI75[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.8N$f$HDI75[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.ALOHAS$f$HDI75[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.ALOHAW$f$HDI75[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.OSP$f$HDI75[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.PAP$f$HDI75[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")]),
  Size == "0.2-0.5 mm" | Size == "1-2 mm" | Size == "2-5 mm" | Size == ">5 mm")# & Location == i)
f.HDI75.long <-
  melt(f.HDI75,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "f")
f.HDI75.long$Size <- factor(f.HDI75.long$Size, levels = sizes)
f.HDI50 <-
  subset(
    bind_rows(
    posts.5N$f$HDI50[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.8N$f$HDI50[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.ALOHAS$f$HDI50[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.ALOHAW$f$HDI50[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.OSP$f$HDI50[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.PAP$f$HDI50[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")]),
  Size == "0.2-0.5 mm" | Size == "1-2 mm" | Size == "2-5 mm" | Size == ">5 mm")# & Location == i)
f.HDI50.long <-
  melt(f.HDI50,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "f")
f.HDI50.long$Size <- factor(f.HDI50.long$Size, levels = sizes)

# Appending columns with the min and max of the 95% HDI to the mode data frame.
f.mode.long$min95 <- f.HDI95.long$f[seq(1,nrow(f.HDI95.long),2)]
f.mode.long$max95 <- f.HDI95.long$f[seq(2,nrow(f.HDI95.long),2)]

# # print(
# ggplot()+
#   # geom_path(
#   #   data=f.mode.long,
#   #   aes(x=f, y=Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Size)),
#   #   size = 1, alpha = 1,
#   #   position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
#   geom_line(
#     data = f.HDI95.long,
#     aes(x = f, y = Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
#     alpha = 0.5, size = 1,
#     position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
#   geom_line(
#     data = f.HDI90.long,
#     aes(x = f, y = Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
#     alpha = 0.7, size = 1.5,
#     position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
#   geom_line(
#     data = f.HDI75.long,
#     aes(x = f, y = Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
#     alpha = 1, size = 2,
#     position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
#   geom_line(
#     data = f.HDI50.long,
#     aes(x = f, y = Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
#     alpha = 1, size = 3,
#     position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
#   geom_point(
#     data=f.mode.long,
#     aes(x=f, y=Depth, fill = Size, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
#     size = 2.5, shape = 22,
#     position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
#   labs()+
#   facet_grid(cols = vars(Source),
#              rows = vars(factor(Location, levels = c("PAP","OSP","ALOHA S","ALOHA W","8 N","5 N"))),
#              scales = "free_y")+
#   # facet_wrap(~ Source, nrow = 1)+
#   scale_y_reverse(breaks = c(0,250,500,750,1000,1250,1500), minor_breaks = c())+
#   coord_cartesian(ylim=c(NA,0))+
#   theme_light()#+
#   # ggtitle(i)
# # )
# # }


f_depth_plots <- function(
    posts
){
  f.mode <- 
  subset(
    posts$f$mode[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
  Size == "0.2-0.5 mm" | Size == "1-2 mm" | Size == "2-5 mm" | Size == ">5 mm")# & Location == i)
f.mode.long <-
  melt(f.mode,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "f")
f.mode.long$Size <- factor(f.mode.long$Size, levels = sizes)
f.HDI95 <- 
  subset(
    posts$f$HDI95[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
  Size == "0.2-0.5 mm" | Size == "1-2 mm" | Size == "2-5 mm" | Size == ">5 mm")# & Location == i)
f.HDI95.long <-
  melt(f.HDI95,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "f")
f.HDI95.long$Size <- factor(f.HDI95.long$Size, levels = sizes)
f.HDI90 <- 
  subset(
    posts$f$HDI90[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
  Size == "0.2-0.5 mm" | Size == "1-2 mm" | Size == "2-5 mm" | Size == ">5 mm")# & Location == i)
f.HDI90.long <-
  melt(f.HDI90,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "f")
f.HDI90.long$Size <- factor(f.HDI90.long$Size, levels = sizes)
f.HDI75 <- 
  subset(
    posts$f$HDI75[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
  Size == "0.2-0.5 mm" | Size == "1-2 mm" | Size == "2-5 mm" | Size == ">5 mm")# & Location == i)
f.HDI75.long <-
  melt(f.HDI75,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "f")
f.HDI75.long$Size <- factor(f.HDI75.long$Size, levels = sizes)
f.HDI50 <- 
  subset(
    posts$f$HDI50[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
  Size == "0.2-0.5 mm" | Size == "1-2 mm" | Size == "2-5 mm" | Size == ">5 mm")# & Location == i)
f.HDI50.long <-
  melt(f.HDI50,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "f")
f.HDI50.long$Size <- factor(f.HDI50.long$Size, levels = sizes)

# Appending columns with the min and max of the 95% HDI to the mode data frame.
f.mode.long$min95 <- f.HDI95.long$f[seq(1,nrow(f.HDI95.long),2)]
f.mode.long$max95 <- f.HDI95.long$f[seq(2,nrow(f.HDI95.long),2)]

sizes <- c("0.2-0.5 mm", "1-2 mm", "2-5 mm", ">5 mm")

# print(
ggplot()+
  # geom_path(
  #   data=f.mode.long,
  #   aes(x=f, y=Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Size)),
  #   size = 1, alpha = 1,
  #   position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  geom_line(
    data = f.HDI95.long,
    aes(x = f, y = Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
    alpha = 0.5, size = 1,
    position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  geom_line(
    data = f.HDI90.long,
    aes(x = f, y = Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
    alpha = 0.7, size = 1.5,
    position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  geom_line(
    data = f.HDI75.long,
    aes(x = f, y = Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
    alpha = 1, size = 2,
    position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  geom_line(
    data = f.HDI50.long,
    aes(x = f, y = Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
    alpha = 1, size = 3,
    position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  geom_point(
    data=f.mode.long,
    aes(x=f, y=Depth, fill = Size, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
    size = 2.5, shape = 22,
    position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  labs()+
  facet_wrap(~ Source)+
  # facet_wrap(~ Source, nrow = 1)+
  scale_y_reverse(breaks = c(0,250,500,750,1000,1250,1500), minor_breaks = c())+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0,0.5,1), labels = c("0","0.5","1"))+
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(NA,-50), expand = FALSE)+
  scale_color_manual(breaks = sizes,
                     values = hue_pal()(length(sizes)))+
  scale_fill_manual(breaks = sizes,
                     values = hue_pal()(length(sizes)))+
  theme_light()+theme(strip.text.x = element_text(size = 8),
                        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
                        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
                        plot.title = element_text(size=12, hjust=0.5))
}

plot.PAP <-
  f_depth_plots(posts.PAP) + ggtitle("North Atlantic")+
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(1000,-50), expand = FALSE)
plot.OSP <-
  f_depth_plots(posts.OSP) + ggtitle("Station Papa")+
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(1000,-50), expand = FALSE)
plot.ALOHAS <-
  f_depth_plots(posts.ALOHAS) + ggtitle("ALOHA Summer")
plot.ALOHAW <-
  f_depth_plots(posts.ALOHAW) + ggtitle("ALOHA Winter")
plot.8N <-
  f_depth_plots(posts.8N) + ggtitle("8° N")
plot.5N <-
  f_depth_plots(posts.5N) + ggtitle("5° N")

plot.blank <-
  ggplot+geom_blank()+theme_bw()+theme(panel.border=element_blank())

ggarrange(
  ggplot() + geom_blank() + ylab("Depth (m)"),

ggarrange(plot.OSP,    plot.PAP,
          plot.ALOHAS, plot.ALOHAW,
          plot.5N,     plot.8N,
          ncol = 2, nrow=3,
          common.legend = TRUE, legend="top"),
  
  ggplot() + geom_blank() + theme_void(),
  ggplot() + geom_blank() + xlab("Mixing Coefficients"),
  widths = c(0.03,1),
  heights = c(1,0.05)
)


```

```{r f_depth_profiles_taxa, DPI = 300, fig.width=8.5, fig.height=6, cache=FALSE}
# for (i in c("5 N","8 N","ALOHA S","ALOHA W","OSP")) {
# Making master data frames including all locations
# Also putting those into long format for plotting
sizes <- c("0.06-0.2 mm", "0.2-0.5 mm", "1-2 mm", "2-5 mm", ">5 mm",
           "Oithonid", "Harpactacoid", "Pleuromamma", "Peuromamma", "Ostracod", "Oncaeid", "Gaussia", "Chaetognath","Radiolarian", "Metridia", "Neocalanus","Gaetanus")
f.mode <-
  subset(
  bind_rows(
    posts.5N$f$mode[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.8N$f$mode[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.ALOHAS$f$mode[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.ALOHAW$f$mode[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.OSP$f$mode[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.PAP$f$mode[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")]),
  Size != "0.06-0.2 mm" & Size != "0.2-0.5 mm" & Size != "1-2 mm" & Size != "2-5 mm" & Size != ">5 mm")# & Location == i)
f.mode.long <-
  melt(f.mode,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "f")
f.mode.long$Size <- factor(f.mode.long$Size, levels = sizes)
f.HDI95 <-
  subset(
    bind_rows(
    posts.5N$f$HDI95[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.8N$f$HDI95[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.ALOHAS$f$HDI95[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.ALOHAW$f$HDI95[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.OSP$f$HDI95[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.PAP$f$HDI95[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")]),
  Size != "0.06-0.2 mm" & Size != "0.2-0.5 mm" & Size != "1-2 mm" & Size != "2-5 mm" & Size != ">5 mm")# & Location == i)
f.HDI95.long <-
  melt(f.HDI95,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "f")
f.HDI95.long$Size <- factor(f.HDI95.long$Size, levels = sizes)
f.HDI90 <-
  subset(
    bind_rows(
    posts.5N$f$HDI90[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.8N$f$HDI90[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.ALOHAS$f$HDI90[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.ALOHAW$f$HDI90[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.OSP$f$HDI90[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.PAP$f$HDI90[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")]),
  Size != "0.06-0.2 mm" & Size != "0.2-0.5 mm" & Size != "1-2 mm" & Size != "2-5 mm" & Size != ">5 mm")# & Location == i)
f.HDI90.long <-
  melt(f.HDI90,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "f")
f.HDI90.long$Size <- factor(f.HDI90.long$Size, levels = sizes)
f.HDI75 <-
  subset(
    bind_rows(
    posts.5N$f$HDI75[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.8N$f$HDI75[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.ALOHAS$f$HDI75[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.ALOHAW$f$HDI75[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.OSP$f$HDI75[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.PAP$f$HDI75[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")]),
  Size != "0.06-0.2 mm" & Size != "0.2-0.5 mm" & Size != "1-2 mm" & Size != "2-5 mm" & Size != ">5 mm")# & Location == i)
f.HDI75.long <-
  melt(f.HDI75,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "f")
f.HDI75.long$Size <- factor(f.HDI75.long$Size, levels = sizes)
f.HDI50 <-
  subset(
    bind_rows(
    posts.5N$f$HDI50[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.8N$f$HDI50[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.ALOHAS$f$HDI50[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.ALOHAW$f$HDI50[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.OSP$f$HDI50[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.PAP$f$HDI50[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")]),
  Size != "0.06-0.2 mm" & Size != "0.2-0.5 mm" & Size != "1-2 mm" & Size != "2-5 mm" & Size != ">5 mm")# & Location == i)
f.HDI50.long <-
  melt(f.HDI50,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "f")
f.HDI50.long$Size <- factor(f.HDI50.long$Size, levels = sizes)

# Appending columns with the min and max of the 95% HDI to the mode data frame.
f.mode.long$min95 <- f.HDI95.long$f[seq(1,nrow(f.HDI95.long),2)]
f.mode.long$max95 <- f.HDI95.long$f[seq(2,nrow(f.HDI95.long),2)]

sizes <- c("Oithonid", "Harpactacoid", "Pleuromamma", "Peuromamma", "Ostracod", "Oncaeid", "Gaussia", "Chaetognath","Radiolarian", "Metridia", "Neocalanus","Gaetanus")

f_depth_plots <- function(
    posts
){
  f.mode <-
  subset(
    posts$f$mode[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
  Size != "0.2-0.5 mm" & Size != "1-2 mm" & Size != "2-5 mm" & Size != ">5 mm")# & Location != i)
f.mode.long <-
  melt(f.mode,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "f")
f.mode.long$Size <- factor(f.mode.long$Size, levels = sizes)
f.HDI95 <-
  subset(
    posts$f$HDI95[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
  Size != "0.2-0.5 mm" & Size != "1-2 mm" & Size != "2-5 mm" & Size != ">5 mm")# & Location != i)
f.HDI95.long <-
  melt(f.HDI95,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "f")
f.HDI95.long$Size <- factor(f.HDI95.long$Size, levels = sizes)
f.HDI90 <-
  subset(
    posts$f$HDI90[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
  Size != "0.2-0.5 mm" & Size != "1-2 mm" & Size != "2-5 mm" & Size != ">5 mm")# & Location != i)
f.HDI90.long <-
  melt(f.HDI90,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "f")
f.HDI90.long$Size <- factor(f.HDI90.long$Size, levels = sizes)
f.HDI75 <-
  subset(
    posts$f$HDI75[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
  Size != "0.2-0.5 mm" & Size != "1-2 mm" & Size != "2-5 mm" & Size != ">5 mm")# & Location != i)
f.HDI75.long <-
  melt(f.HDI75,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "f")
f.HDI75.long$Size <- factor(f.HDI75.long$Size, levels = sizes)
f.HDI50 <-
  subset(
    posts$f$HDI50[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
  Size != "0.2-0.5 mm" & Size != "1-2 mm" & Size != "2-5 mm" & Size != ">5 mm")# & Location != i)
f.HDI50.long <-
  melt(f.HDI50,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "f")
f.HDI50.long$Size <- factor(f.HDI50.long$Size, levels = sizes)

# Appending columns with the min and max of the 95% HDI to the mode data frame.
f.mode.long$min95 <- f.HDI95.long$f[seq(1,nrow(f.HDI95.long),2)]
f.mode.long$max95 <- f.HDI95.long$f[seq(2,nrow(f.HDI95.long),2)]

# print(
ggplot(mapping = 
         aes(x = f, y = Depth, color = Size, fill = Size, shape = Size, 
           group = interaction(Depth, Size)))+
  # geom_path(
  #   data=f.mode.long,
  #   aes(x=f, y=Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Size)),
  #   size = 1, alpha = 1,
  #   position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  geom_line(
    data = f.HDI95.long,
    alpha = 0.5, size = 1,
    position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  geom_line(
    data = f.HDI90.long,
    alpha = 0.7, size = 1.5,
    position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  geom_line(
    data = f.HDI75.long,
    alpha = 1, size = 2,
    position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  geom_line(
    data = f.HDI50.long,
    alpha = 1, size = 3,
    position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  geom_point(
    data=f.mode.long,
    size = 2.5, color = "black",
    position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(21,22,23,24,21,22,23,24,21,22,23,24))+
  facet_wrap(~ Source)+
  # facet_wrap(~ Source, nrow = 1)+
  scale_y_reverse(breaks = c(0,250,500,750,1000,1250,1500), minor_breaks = c())+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0,0.5,1), labels = c("0","0.5","1"))+
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(NA,0))+
  scale_color_manual(breaks = sizes,
                     values = hue_pal()(length(sizes)))+
  scale_fill_manual(breaks = sizes,
                     values = hue_pal()(length(sizes)))+
  labs(color="Taxa",fill="Taxa",shape="Taxa")+
  theme_light()+theme(strip.text.x = element_text(size = 8),
                        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
                        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
                        plot.title = element_text(size=12, hjust=0.5))
}

plot.PAP <-
  f_depth_plots(posts.PAP) + ggtitle("North Atlantic")
plot.OSP <-
  f_depth_plots(posts.OSP) + ggtitle("Station Papa")
plot.ALOHAS <-
  f_depth_plots(posts.ALOHAS) + ggtitle("ALOHA Summer")
plot.ALOHAW <-
  f_depth_plots(posts.ALOHAW) + ggtitle("ALOHA Winter")
# plot.8N <-
#   f_depth_plots(posts.8N) + ggtitle("8 N")
# plot.5N <-
#   f_depth_plots(posts.5N) + ggtitle("5 N")

plot.blank <-
  ggplot+geom_blank()+theme_bw()+theme(panel.border=element_blank())

ggarrange(
  ggplot() + geom_blank() + ylab("Depth (m)"),

ggarrange(plot.OSP,    plot.PAP,
          plot.ALOHAS, plot.ALOHAW,
          #plot.5N,     plot.8N,
          ncol = 2, nrow = 2,
          common.legend = FALSE, legend="right"),

  ggplot() + geom_blank() + theme_void(),
  ggplot() + geom_blank() + xlab("Mixing Coefficients"),
  widths = c(0.04,1),
  heights = c(1,0.05)
)

# ggplot()+
#   # geom_path(
#   #   data=f.mode.long,
#   #   aes(x=f, y=Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Size)),
#   #   size = 1, alpha = 1,
#   #   position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
#   geom_line(
#     data = f.HDI95,
#     aes(x = Surface, y = Depth, color = Location, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
#     alpha = 0.5, size = 1,
#     position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
#   geom_line(
#     data = f.HDI90,
#     aes(x = Surface, y = Depth, color = Location, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
#     alpha = 0.7, size = 1.5,
#     position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
#   geom_line(
#     data = f.HDI75,
#     aes(x = Surface, y = Depth, color = Location, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
#     alpha = 1, size = 2,
#     position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
#   geom_line(
#     data = f.HDI50,
#     aes(x = Surface, y = Depth, color = Location, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
#     alpha = 1, size = 3,
#     position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
#   geom_point(
#     data=f.mode,
#     aes(x=Surface, y=Depth, fill = Location, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
#     size = 2.5, shape = 22,
#     position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
#   labs()+
#   facet_wrap(~ Size, nrow=2)+
#   # facet_wrap(~ Source, nrow = 1)+
#   scale_y_reverse(breaks = c(0,250,500,750,1000,1250,1500), minor_breaks = c())+
#   scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0,0.5,1), labels = c("0","0.5","1"))+
#   coord_cartesian(ylim=c(NA,0))+
#   theme_light()

noquote("Some summary stats:")

noquote("OSP Carnivores")
min(subset(posts.OSP$f$mode , Size == "Chaetognath" | Size == "Radiolarian")$Surface)
mean(subset(posts.OSP$f$mode , Size == "Chaetognath" | Size == "Radiolarian")$Surface)
max(subset(posts.OSP$f$mode , Size == "Chaetognath" | Size == "Radiolarian")$Surface)

noquote("OSP Metridia")
subset(posts.OSP$f$mode , Size == "Metridia")$Surface

noquote("PAP Carnivores, Migrators, Detritivores")
min(subset(posts.PAP$f$mode , Size == "Chaetognath" | Size == "Metridia" | Size == "Pleuromamma" | Size == "Oncaeid")$Surface)
mean(subset(posts.PAP$f$mode , Size == "Chaetognath" | Size == "Metridia" | Size == "Pleuromamma" | Size == "Oncaeid")$Surface)
max(subset(posts.PAP$f$mode , Size == "Chaetognath" | Size == "Metridia" | Size == "Pleuromamma" | Size == "Oncaeid")$Surface)

noquote("PAP Oncaeia")
min(subset(posts.PAP$f$mode , Size == "Oncaeid")$Surface)
mean(subset(posts.PAP$f$mode , Size == "Oncaeid")$Surface)
max(subset(posts.PAP$f$mode , Size == "Oncaeid")$Surface)

noquote("Gaetanus at 225 m")
subset(posts.PAP$f$mode , Size == "Gaetanus" & Depth == 225)$Surface

noquote("Gaetanus at 625 m")
subset(posts.PAP$f$mode , Size == "Gaetanus" & Depth == 625)$Surface

noquote("ALOHA Chaetognaths, Harpactacoids, and Pleuromamma")
min(subset(rbind(posts.ALOHAS$f$mode,posts.ALOHAW$f$mode) , (Size == "Chaetognath" & Depth<1000) | Size == "Harpactacoid" | Size == "Pleuromamma")$Surface)
mean(subset(rbind(posts.ALOHAS$f$mode,posts.ALOHAW$f$mode) , (Size == "Chaetognath" & Depth<1000) | Size == "Harpactacoid" | Size == "Pleuromamma")$Surface)
max(subset(rbind(posts.ALOHAS$f$mode,posts.ALOHAW$f$mode) , (Size == "Chaetognath" & Depth<1000) | Size == "Harpactacoid" | Size == "Pleuromamma")$Surface)

```

Next we're going to make depth profiles, comparing the mixing model results at all five locations.

```{r f_depth_profiles_1-2, DPI = 300, fig.width=8.5, fig.asp=0.4, warning =FALSE, cache=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
# # Because submicron particles were not collected at 5N and 8N, we will make a
# # column call "Small" which we can compare to mixing model resuls from
# # other location where small and submicron particles are pooled.
# posts.5N$f$mode$Small <- posts.5N$f$mode$Small
# posts.8N$f$mode$Small <- posts.8N$f$mode$Small
# posts.5N$f$HDI95$Small <- posts.5N$f$HDI95$Small
# posts.8N$f$HDI95$Small <- posts.8N$f$HDI95$Small
# posts.5N$f$HDI90$Small <- posts.5N$f$HDI90$Small
# posts.8N$f$HDI90$Small <- posts.8N$f$HDI90$Small
# posts.5N$f$HDI75$Small <- posts.5N$f$HDI75$Small
# posts.8N$f$HDI75$Small <- posts.8N$f$HDI75$Small
# posts.5N$f$HDI50$Small <- posts.5N$f$HDI50$Small
# posts.8N$f$HDI50$Small <- posts.8N$f$HDI50$Small

# Making master data frames including all locations
# Also putting those into long format for plotting
f.mode <- 
  subset(
    bind_rows(
    posts.5N$f$mode[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.8N$f$mode[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.ALOHAS$f$mode[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.ALOHAW$f$mode[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.OSP$f$mode[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.PAP$f$mode[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")]),
    Size == "1-2 mm")
f.mode.long <-
  melt(f.mode,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "f")
f.HDI95 <- 
  subset(
    bind_rows(
    posts.5N$f$HDI95[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.8N$f$HDI95[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.ALOHAS$f$HDI95[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.ALOHAW$f$HDI95[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.OSP$f$HDI95[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.PAP$f$HDI95[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")]),
    Size == "1-2 mm")
f.HDI95.long <-
  melt(f.HDI95,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "f")
f.HDI90 <- 
  subset(
    bind_rows(
    posts.5N$f$HDI90[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.8N$f$HDI90[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.ALOHAS$f$HDI90[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.ALOHAW$f$HDI90[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.OSP$f$HDI90[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.PAP$f$HDI90[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")]),
    Size == "1-2 mm")
f.HDI90.long <-
  melt(f.HDI90,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "f")
f.HDI75 <- 
  subset(
    bind_rows(
    posts.5N$f$HDI75[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.8N$f$HDI75[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.ALOHAS$f$HDI75[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.ALOHAW$f$HDI75[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.OSP$f$HDI75[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.PAP$f$HDI75[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")]),
    Size == "1-2 mm")
f.HDI75.long <-
  melt(f.HDI75,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "f")
f.HDI50 <- 
  subset(
    bind_rows(
    posts.5N$f$HDI50[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.8N$f$HDI50[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.ALOHAS$f$HDI50[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.ALOHAW$f$HDI50[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.OSP$f$HDI50[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.PAP$f$HDI50[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")]),
    Size == "1-2 mm")
f.HDI50.long <-
  melt(f.HDI50,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "f")

# Appending columns with the min and max of the 95% HDI to the mode data frame.
f.mode.long$min95 <- f.HDI95.long$f[seq(1,nrow(f.HDI95.long),2)]
f.mode.long$max95 <- f.HDI95.long$f[seq(2,nrow(f.HDI95.long),2)]

ggplot()+
  geom_colh(data = f.mode.long,
            aes(x=f, y=Depth, fill=Source),
            width = 90, color = "black")+
  # geom_errorbarh(data = f.mode.long,
  #                aes(x=f, y=Depth, fill=Source,
  #                    xmin = min95, xmax = max95),
  #                height=0,
  #                position = position_dodgev(height=90))+
  labs(color= "Organic Matter Source")+
  facet_wrap(~ Location, nrow=1)+
  scale_y_reverse(breaks = c(0,200,500,1000,1500), minor_breaks = c())+
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(1500,0))+
  theme_light()
  
ggplot()+
  geom_path(
    data=f.mode.long,
    aes(x=f, y=Depth, color=Location),
    size = 1, alpha = 1,
    position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  geom_line(
    data = f.HDI95.long,
    aes(x = f, y = Depth, group = interaction(Depth, Location), 
        color = Location),
    alpha = 0.2, size = 1,
    position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  geom_line(
    data = f.HDI90.long,
    aes(x = f, y = Depth, group = interaction(Depth, Location), 
        color = Location),
    alpha = 0.2, size = 1.5,
    position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  geom_line(
    data = f.HDI75.long,
    aes(x = f, y = Depth, group = interaction(Depth, Location), 
        color = Location),
    alpha = 0.3, size = 2,
    position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  geom_line(
    data = f.HDI50.long,
    aes(x = f, y = Depth, group = interaction(Depth, Location), 
        color = Location),
    alpha = 0.5, size = 3,
    position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  geom_point(
    data=f.mode.long,
    aes(x=f, y=Depth, fill=Location),
    size = 2.5, shape = 22,
    position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  labs(color= "Location")+
  facet_wrap(~ Source, nrow=1)+
  scale_y_reverse(breaks = c(0,200,500,1000,1500), minor_breaks = c())+
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(1500,0))+
  theme_light()

```

# Trophic Parameter Depth Profiles {-}

First we'll try and make a full page figure of all model results from all locations.

```{r trophic_depth_profiles, DPI = 300, fig.width=8.5, fig.asp=1, cache=FALSE}
# for (i in c("5 N","8 N","ALOHA S","ALOHA W","OSP")) {
# Making master data frames including all locations
# Also putting those into long format for plotting
sizes <- c("0.06-0.2 mm", "0.2-0.5 mm", "1-2 mm", "2-5 mm", ">5 mm",
           "Oithonid", "Harpactacoid", "Pleuromamma", "Peuromamma", "Ostracod", "Oncaeid", "Gaussia", "Chaetognath","Radiolarian", "Metridia", "Neocalanus","Gaetanus")
trophic.mode <- 
  subset(
  bind_rows(
    posts.5N$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.8N$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAS$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAW$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.OSP$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.PAP$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")]),
  Size != "0.06-0.2 mm")# & Location == i)
trophic.mode.long <-
  melt(trophic.mode,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "value")
trophic.mode.long$Size <- factor(trophic.mode.long$Size, levels = sizes)
trophic.HDI95 <- 
  subset(
    bind_rows(
    posts.5N$trophic$HDI95[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.8N$trophic$HDI95[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAS$trophic$HDI95[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAW$trophic$HDI95[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.OSP$trophic$HDI95[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.PAP$trophic$HDI95[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")]),
  Size != "0.06-0.2 mm")# & Location == i)
trophic.HDI95.long <-
  melt(trophic.HDI95,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "value")
trophic.HDI95.long$Size <- factor(trophic.HDI95.long$Size, levels = sizes)
trophic.HDI90 <- 
  subset(
    bind_rows(
    posts.5N$trophic$HDI90[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.8N$trophic$HDI90[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAS$trophic$HDI90[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAW$trophic$HDI90[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.OSP$trophic$HDI90[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.PAP$trophic$HDI90[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")]),
  Size != "0.06-0.2 mm")# & Location == i)
trophic.HDI90.long <-
  melt(trophic.HDI90,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "value")
trophic.HDI90.long$Size <- factor(trophic.HDI90.long$Size, levels = sizes)
trophic.HDI75 <- 
  subset(
    bind_rows(
    posts.5N$trophic$HDI75[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.8N$trophic$HDI75[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAS$trophic$HDI75[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAW$trophic$HDI75[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.OSP$trophic$HDI75[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.PAP$trophic$HDI75[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")]),
  Size != "0.06-0.2 mm")# & Location == i)
trophic.HDI75.long <-
  melt(trophic.HDI75,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "value")
trophic.HDI75.long$Size <- factor(trophic.HDI75.long$Size, levels = sizes)
trophic.HDI50 <- 
  subset(
    bind_rows(
    posts.5N$trophic$HDI50[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.8N$trophic$HDI50[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAS$trophic$HDI50[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAW$trophic$HDI50[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.OSP$trophic$HDI50[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.PAP$trophic$HDI50[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")]),
  Size != "0.06-0.2 mm")# & Location == i)
trophic.HDI50.long <-
  melt(trophic.HDI50,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "value")
trophic.HDI50.long$Size <- factor(trophic.HDI50.long$Size, levels = sizes)

# Appending columns with the min and max of the 95% HDI to the mode data frame.
trophic.mode.long$min95 <- trophic.HDI95.long$trophic[seq(1,nrow(trophic.HDI95.long),2)]
trophic.mode.long$max95 <- trophic.HDI95.long$trophic[seq(2,nrow(trophic.HDI95.long),2)]
  
# # print(
# ggplot()+
#   # geom_path(
#   #   data=trophic.mode.long,
#   #   aes(x=f, y=Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Size)),
#   #   size = 1, alpha = 1,
#   #   position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
#   geom_line(
#     data = trophic.HDI95.long,
#     aes(x = value, y = Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
#     alpha = 0.5, size = 1,
#     position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
#   geom_line(
#     data = trophic.HDI90.long,
#     aes(x = value, y = Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
#     alpha = 0.7, size = 1.5,
#     position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
#   geom_line(
#     data = trophic.HDI75.long,
#     aes(x = value, y = Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
#     alpha = 1, size = 2,
#     position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
#   geom_line(
#     data = trophic.HDI50.long,
#     aes(x = value, y = Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
#     alpha = 1, size = 3,
#     position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
#   geom_point(
#     data=trophic.mode.long,
#     aes(x = value, y = Depth, fill = Size, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
#     size = 2.5, shape = 22,
#     position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
#   labs()+
#   facet_grid(cols = vars(Source), 
#              rows = vars(factor(Location, levels = c("OSP","ALOHA S","ALOHA W","8 N","5 N"))),
#              scales = "free")+
#   scale_y_reverse(breaks = c(0,250,500,750,1000,1250,1500), minor_breaks = c())+
#   scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0,1,2,3,4,5), minor_breaks = c(0.5,1.5,2.6,3.5,4.5))+
#   coord_cartesian(ylim=c(NA,0), xlim=c(0,NA))+
#   xlab("Trophic Parameter")+
#   theme_light()
# # )
# # }

trophic_depth_plots <- function(
    posts
){
  trophic.mode <- 
  subset(
    posts$trophic$mode[c(variables,"FWL","PTS","MTS")],
  Size == "0.2-0.5 mm" | Size == "1-2 mm" | Size == "2-5 mm" | Size == ">5 mm")# & Location == i)
trophic.mode.long <-
  melt(trophic.mode,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "value")
trophic.mode.long$Size <- factor(trophic.mode.long$Size, levels = sizes)
trophic.HDI95 <- 
  subset(
    posts$trophic$HDI95[c(variables,"FWL","PTS","MTS")],
  Size == "0.2-0.5 mm" | Size == "1-2 mm" | Size == "2-5 mm" | Size == ">5 mm")# & Location == i)
trophic.HDI95.long <-
  melt(trophic.HDI95,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "value")
trophic.HDI95.long$Size <- factor(trophic.HDI95.long$Size, levels = sizes)
trophic.HDI90 <- 
  subset(
    posts$trophic$HDI90[c(variables,"FWL","PTS","MTS")],
  Size == "0.2-0.5 mm" | Size == "1-2 mm" | Size == "2-5 mm" | Size == ">5 mm")# & Location == i)
trophic.HDI90.long <-
  melt(trophic.HDI90,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "value")
trophic.HDI90.long$Size <- factor(trophic.HDI90.long$Size, levels = sizes)
trophic.HDI75 <- 
  subset(
    posts$trophic$HDI75[c(variables,"FWL","PTS","MTS")],
  Size == "0.2-0.5 mm" | Size == "1-2 mm" | Size == "2-5 mm" | Size == ">5 mm")# & Location == i)
trophic.HDI75.long <-
  melt(trophic.HDI75,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "value")
trophic.HDI75.long$Size <- factor(trophic.HDI75.long$Size, levels = sizes)
trophic.HDI50 <- 
  subset(
    posts$trophic$HDI50[c(variables,"FWL","PTS","MTS")],
  Size == "0.2-0.5 mm" | Size == "1-2 mm" | Size == "2-5 mm" | Size == ">5 mm")# & Location == i)
trophic.HDI50.long <-
  melt(trophic.HDI50,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "value")
trophic.HDI50.long$Size <- factor(trophic.HDI50.long$Size, levels = sizes)

# Appending columns with the min and max of the 95% HDI to the mode data frame.
trophic.mode.long$min95 <- trophic.HDI95.long$trophic[seq(1,nrow(trophic.HDI95.long),2)]
trophic.mode.long$max95 <- trophic.HDI95.long$trophic[seq(2,nrow(trophic.HDI95.long),2)]

sizes <- c("0.2-0.5 mm", "1-2 mm", "2-5 mm", ">5 mm")

# print(
ggplot()+
  # geom_path(
  #   data=trophic.mode.long,
  #   aes(x=f, y=Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Size)),
  #   size = 1, alpha = 1,
  #   position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  geom_line(
    data = trophic.HDI95.long,
    aes(x = value, y = Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
    alpha = 0.5, size = 1,
    position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  geom_line(
    data = trophic.HDI90.long,
    aes(x = value, y = Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
    alpha = 0.7, size = 1.5,
    position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  geom_line(
    data = trophic.HDI75.long,
    aes(x = value, y = Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
    alpha = 1, size = 2,
    position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  geom_line(
    data = trophic.HDI50.long,
    aes(x = value, y = Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
    alpha = 1, size = 3,
    position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  geom_point(
    data=trophic.mode.long,
    aes(x = value, y=Depth, fill = Size, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
    size = 2.5, shape = 22,
    position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  labs()+
  facet_wrap(~ Source)+
  # facet_wrap(~ Source, nrow = 1)+
  scale_y_reverse(breaks = c(0,250,500,750,1000,1250,1500), minor_breaks = c())+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-1,5,0.5), 
                     labels = c("-1","","0","","1","","2","","3","","4","","5"))+
  scale_color_manual(breaks = sizes,
                     values = hue_pal()(length(sizes)))+
  scale_fill_manual(breaks = sizes,
                    values = hue_pal()(length(sizes)))+
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(NA,-50), xlim=c(0,NA), expand=FALSE)+
  theme_light()+theme(strip.text.x = element_text(size = 8),
                      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
                      axis.title.y = element_blank(),
                      plot.title = element_text(size=12, hjust=0.5))
}

# alternative plot plotting colors
  # scale_color_manual(breaks = sizes,
  #                    values = c("goldenrod1","darkorange2","maroon3","purple1"))+
  # scale_fill_manual(breaks = sizes,
  #                    values = c("goldenrod1","darkorange2","maroon3","purple1"))+

plot.PAP <-
  trophic_depth_plots(posts.PAP) + ggtitle("North Atlantic")+
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(1000,-50), expand = FALSE)
plot.OSP <-
  trophic_depth_plots(posts.OSP) + ggtitle("Station Papa")+
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(1000,-50), expand = FALSE)
plot.ALOHAS <-
  trophic_depth_plots(posts.ALOHAS) + ggtitle("ALOHA Summer")
plot.ALOHAW <-
  trophic_depth_plots(posts.ALOHAW) + ggtitle("ALOHA Winter")
plot.8N <-
  trophic_depth_plots(posts.8N) + ggtitle("8° N")
plot.5N <-
  trophic_depth_plots(posts.5N) + ggtitle("5° N")

plot.blank <-
  ggplot+geom_blank()+theme_bw()+theme(panel.border=element_blank())

ggarrange(
  ggplot() + geom_blank() + ylab("Depth (m)"),

ggarrange(plot.OSP,    plot.PAP,
          plot.ALOHAS, plot.ALOHAW,
          plot.5N,     plot.8N,
          ncol = 2, nrow=3,
          common.legend = TRUE, legend="top"),
  
  ggplot() + geom_blank() + theme_void(),
  ggplot() + geom_blank() + xlab("Trophic Parameters"),
  widths = c(0.03,1),
  heights = c(1,0.05)
)
```

```{r trophic_depth_profiles_v2, DPI = 300, fig.width=5, fig.height=6, cache=FALSE}
# for (i in c("5 N","8 N","ALOHA S","ALOHA W","OSP")) {
# Making master data frames including all locations
# Also putting those into long format for plotting
sizes <- c("0.06-0.2 mm", "0.2-0.5 mm", "1-2 mm", "2-5 mm", ">5 mm",
           "Oithonid", "Harpactacoid", "Pleuromamma", "Peuromamma", "Ostracod", "Oncaeid", "Gaussia", "Chaetognath","Radiolarian", "Metridia", "Neocalanus","Gaetanus")
trophic.mode <- 
  subset(
  bind_rows(
    posts.5N$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.8N$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAS$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAW$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.OSP$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.PAP$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")]),
  Size != "0.06-0.2 mm")# & Location == i)
trophic.mode$Location <- factor(trophic.mode$Location)
trophic.mode$Location[which(trophic.mode$Location == "Station P")] <- "Station Papa"
levels(trophic.mode$Location) <- c("5° N","8° N","ALOHA S","ALOHA W","Station Papa","N Atlantic")
# Let's calculate TP at the base of the food web
base.mode <- 
  subset(
  bind_rows(
    posts.5N$base$mode[c(variables,"d15NAla","d15NPhe")],
    posts.8N$base$mode[c(variables,"d15NAla","d15NPhe")],
    posts.ALOHAS$base$mode[c(variables,"d15NAla","d15NPhe")],
    posts.ALOHAW$base$mode[c(variables,"d15NAla","d15NPhe")],
    posts.OSP$base$mode[c(variables,"d15NAla","d15NPhe")],
    posts.PAP$base$mode[c(variables,"d15NAla","d15NPhe")]),
  Size != "0.06-0.2 mm")# & Location == i)
trophic.mode$baseTP <- (base.mode$d15NAla - base.mode$d15NPhe - 3.2) / 6.3 + 1
trophic.mode$Size <- factor(trophic.mode$Size, levels = sizes)
trophic.mode.long <-
  melt(trophic.mode,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "value")
trophic.mode.long$Size <- factor(trophic.mode.long$Size, levels = sizes)

data.all$TP <- (data.all$d15NAla - data.all$d15NPhe - 3.2) / 6.3 + 1

trophic.mode.mean <- aggregate(
  x = cbind(FWL,baseTP) ~ Depth + Location,
  data = subset(trophic.mode,
                Size == "0.2-0.5 mm" | Size == "1-2 mm" | 
                  Size == "2-5 mm" | Size == ">5 mm"),
  FUN = "mean"
)
trophic.mode.range <- aggregate(
  x = cbind(FWL,baseTP) ~ Depth + Location,
  data = subset(trophic.mode,
                Size == "0.2-0.5 mm" | Size == "1-2 mm" | 
                  Size == "2-5 mm" | Size == ">5 mm"),
  FUN = "range"
)
trophic.mode.range$FWLstr <- NA
trophic.mode.range$baseTPstr <- NA
for (i in 1:nrow(trophic.mode.range)) {
  if (round(trophic.mode.range$FWL[i,1],1) == 
      round(trophic.mode.range$FWL[i,2],1)) {
    trophic.mode.range$FWLstr[i] <- round(trophic.mode.range[i,3],1)
  } else {
    trophic.mode.range$FWLstr[i] <-
      paste(round(trophic.mode.range$FWL[i,1],1),"-", 
      round(trophic.mode.range$FWL[i,2],1), sep=" ")
  }
  if (round(trophic.mode.range$baseTP[i,1],1) == 
      round(trophic.mode.range$baseTP[i,2],1)) {
    trophic.mode.range$baseTPstr[i] <- round(trophic.mode.range[i,4],1)
  } else {
    trophic.mode.range$baseTPstr[i] <-
      paste(round(trophic.mode.range$baseTP[i,1],1),"-", 
      round(trophic.mode.range$baseTP[i,2],1), sep=" ")
  }
}
trophic.mode.range$FWL <- trophic.mode.mean$FWL
trophic.mode.range$baseTP <- trophic.mode.mean$baseTP

ggplot(
  data = subset(trophic.mode,
                Size == "0.2-0.5 mm" | Size == "1-2 mm" | Size == "2-5 mm" | Size == ">5 mm")
) +
  geom_colh(
    aes(x = FWL+baseTP, y = Depth, group = Size, fill = "FWL"),
    position = "dodgev", width = 90,
  )+
  geom_text(
    data = trophic.mode.range,
    aes(x = (FWL/2+baseTP), y = Depth, label = round(FWL,1), color = "FWL")
  )+
  geom_colh(
    aes(x = baseTP, y = Depth, group = Size, fill = "Base TP"),
    position = "dodgev", width = 90,
  )+
  geom_text(
    data = trophic.mode.range,
    aes(x = baseTP/2, y = Depth, label = round(baseTP,1), color = "Base TP")
    )+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("steelblue","goldenrod"))+
  scale_color_manual(values = c("lightblue1","darkorange4"))+
  # geom_colh(
  #   data = subset(data.all,
  #               Size == "0.2-0.5 mm" | Size == "1-2 mm" | Size == "2-5 mm" | Size == ">5 mm"),
  #   aes(x = TP, y = Depth+20, group = Size),
  #   position = "dodgev", width = 40, fill = "goldenrod"
  # )+
  scale_y_reverse()+
  facet_wrap(~Location, nrow=2, dir = "v")+
  labs(fill="",color="") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  xlab("Base TP + Food Web Length") + ylab("Depth (m)")

```


```{r trophic_depth_profiles_taxa, DPI = 300, fig.width=8.5, fig.height=6, cache=FALSE}
# for (i in c("5 N","8 N","ALOHA S","ALOHA W","OSP")) {
# Making master data frames including all locations
# Also putting those into long format for plotting
sizes <- c("0.06-0.2 mm", "0.2-0.5 mm", "1-2 mm", "2-5 mm", ">5 mm",
           "Oithonid", "Harpactacoid", "Pleuromamma", "Peuromamma", "Ostracod", "Oncaeid", "Gaussia", "Chaetognath","Radiolarian", "Metridia", "Neocalanus","Gaetanus")
trophic.mode <-
  subset(
  bind_rows(
    posts.5N$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.8N$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAS$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAW$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.OSP$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.PAP$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")]),
  Size != "0.06-0.2 mm")# & Location == i)
trophic.mode.long <-
  melt(trophic.mode,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "value")
trophic.mode.long$Size <- factor(trophic.mode.long$Size, levels = sizes)
trophic.HDI95 <-
  subset(
    bind_rows(
    posts.5N$trophic$HDI95[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.8N$trophic$HDI95[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAS$trophic$HDI95[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAW$trophic$HDI95[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.OSP$trophic$HDI95[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.PAP$trophic$HDI95[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")]),
  Size != "0.06-0.2 mm")# & Location == i)
trophic.HDI95.long <-
  melt(trophic.HDI95,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "value")
trophic.HDI95.long$Size <- factor(trophic.HDI95.long$Size, levels = sizes)
trophic.HDI90 <-
  subset(
    bind_rows(
    posts.5N$trophic$HDI90[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.8N$trophic$HDI90[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAS$trophic$HDI90[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAW$trophic$HDI90[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.OSP$trophic$HDI90[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.PAP$trophic$HDI90[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")]),
  Size != "0.06-0.2 mm")# & Location == i)
trophic.HDI90.long <-
  melt(trophic.HDI90,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "value")
trophic.HDI90.long$Size <- factor(trophic.HDI90.long$Size, levels = sizes)
trophic.HDI75 <-
  subset(
    bind_rows(
    posts.5N$trophic$HDI75[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.8N$trophic$HDI75[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAS$trophic$HDI75[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAW$trophic$HDI75[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.OSP$trophic$HDI75[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.PAP$trophic$HDI75[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")]),
  Size != "0.06-0.2 mm")# & Location == i)
trophic.HDI75.long <-
  melt(trophic.HDI75,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "value")
trophic.HDI75.long$Size <- factor(trophic.HDI75.long$Size, levels = sizes)
trophic.HDI50 <-
  subset(
    bind_rows(
    posts.5N$trophic$HDI50[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.8N$trophic$HDI50[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAS$trophic$HDI50[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAW$trophic$HDI50[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.OSP$trophic$HDI50[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.PAP$trophic$HDI50[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")]),
  Size != "0.06-0.2 mm")# & Location == i)
trophic.HDI50.long <-
  melt(trophic.HDI50,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "value")
trophic.HDI50.long$Size <- factor(trophic.HDI50.long$Size, levels = sizes)

# Appending columns with the min and max of the 95% HDI to the mode data frame.
trophic.mode.long$min95 <- trophic.HDI95.long$trophic[seq(1,nrow(trophic.HDI95.long),2)]
trophic.mode.long$max95 <- trophic.HDI95.long$trophic[seq(2,nrow(trophic.HDI95.long),2)]
#   
# # print(
# ggplot()+
#   # geom_path(
#   #   data=trophic.mode.long,
#   #   aes(x=f, y=Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Size)),
#   #   size = 1, alpha = 1,
#   #   position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
#   geom_line(
#     data = trophic.HDI95.long,
#     aes(x = value, y = Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
#     alpha = 0.5, size = 1,
#     position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
#   geom_line(
#     data = trophic.HDI90.long,
#     aes(x = value, y = Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
#     alpha = 0.7, size = 1.5,
#     position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
#   geom_line(
#     data = trophic.HDI75.long,
#     aes(x = value, y = Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
#     alpha = 1, size = 2,
#     position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
#   geom_line(
#     data = trophic.HDI50.long,
#     aes(x = value, y = Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
#     alpha = 1, size = 3,
#     position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
#   geom_point(
#     data=trophic.mode.long,
#     aes(x = value, y = Depth, fill = Size, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
#     size = 2.5, shape = 22,
#     position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
#   labs()+
#   facet_grid(cols = vars(Source), 
#              rows = vars(factor(Location, levels = c("OSP","ALOHA S","ALOHA W","8 N","5 N"))),
#              scales = "free")+
#   scale_y_reverse(breaks = c(0,250,500,750,1000,1250,1500), minor_breaks = c())+
#   scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0,1,2,3,4,5), minor_breaks = c(0.5,1.5,2.6,3.5,4.5))+
#   coord_cartesian(ylim=c(NA,0), xlim=c(-0.25,NA))+
#   xlab("Trophic Parameter")+
#   theme_light()
# # )
# # }

sizes <- c("Oithonid", "Harpactacoid", "Pleuromamma", "Peuromamma", "Ostracod", "Oncaeid", "Gaussia", "Chaetognath","Radiolarian", "Metridia", "Neocalanus","Gaetanus")

trophic_depth_plots <- function(
    posts
){
  trophic.mode <- 
  subset(
    posts$trophic$mode[c(variables,"FWL","PTS","MTS")],
  Size != "0.2-0.5 mm" & Size != "1-2 mm" & Size != "2-5 mm" & Size != ">5 mm")# & Location == i)
trophic.mode.long <-
  melt(trophic.mode,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "value")
trophic.mode.long$Size <- factor(trophic.mode.long$Size, levels = sizes)
trophic.HDI95 <- 
  subset(
    posts$trophic$HDI95[c(variables,"FWL","PTS","MTS")],
  Size != "0.2-0.5 mm" & Size != "1-2 mm" & Size != "2-5 mm" & Size != ">5 mm")# & Location == i)
trophic.HDI95.long <-
  melt(trophic.HDI95,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "value")
trophic.HDI95.long$Size <- factor(trophic.HDI95.long$Size, levels = sizes)
trophic.HDI90 <- 
  subset(
    posts$trophic$HDI90[c(variables,"FWL","PTS","MTS")],
  Size != "0.2-0.5 mm" & Size != "1-2 mm" & Size != "2-5 mm" & Size != ">5 mm")# & Location == i)
trophic.HDI90.long <-
  melt(trophic.HDI90,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "value")
trophic.HDI90.long$Size <- factor(trophic.HDI90.long$Size, levels = sizes)
trophic.HDI75 <- 
  subset(
    posts$trophic$HDI75[c(variables,"FWL","PTS","MTS")],
  Size != "0.2-0.5 mm" & Size != "1-2 mm" & Size != "2-5 mm" & Size != ">5 mm")# & Location == i)
trophic.HDI75.long <-
  melt(trophic.HDI75,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "value")
trophic.HDI75.long$Size <- factor(trophic.HDI75.long$Size, levels = sizes)
trophic.HDI50 <- 
  subset(
    posts$trophic$HDI50[c(variables,"FWL","PTS","MTS")],
  Size != "0.2-0.5 mm" & Size != "1-2 mm" & Size != "2-5 mm" & Size != ">5 mm")# & Location == i)
trophic.HDI50.long <-
  melt(trophic.HDI50,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "value")
trophic.HDI50.long$Size <- factor(trophic.HDI50.long$Size, levels = sizes)

# Appending columns with the min and max of the 95% HDI to the mode data frame.
trophic.mode.long$min95 <- trophic.HDI95.long$trophic[seq(1,nrow(trophic.HDI95.long),2)]
trophic.mode.long$max95 <- trophic.HDI95.long$trophic[seq(2,nrow(trophic.HDI95.long),2)]

# print(
ggplot(mapping = 
         aes(x = value, y = Depth, color = Size, fill = Size, shape = Size, 
           group = interaction(Depth, Size)))+
  # geom_path(
  #   data=trophic.mode.long,
  #   aes(x=f, y=Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Size)),
  #   size = 1, alpha = 1,
  #   position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  geom_line(
    data = trophic.HDI95.long,
    alpha = 0.5, size = 1,
    position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  geom_line(
    data = trophic.HDI90.long,
    alpha = 0.7, size = 1.5,
    position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  geom_line(
    data = trophic.HDI75.long,
    alpha = 1, size = 2,
    position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  geom_line(
    data = trophic.HDI50.long,
    alpha = 1, size = 3,
    position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  geom_point(
    data=trophic.mode.long,
    size = 2.5, color = "black",
    position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(21,22,23,24,21,22,23,24,21,22,23,24))+
  labs(color="Taxa",fill="Taxa",shape="Taxa")+
  facet_wrap(~ Source)+
  # facet_wrap(~ Source, nrow = 1)+
  scale_y_reverse(breaks = c(0,250,500,750,1000,1250,1500), 
                  minor_breaks = c())+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-1,5,0.5), 
                     minor_breaks = c(),
                     labels = c("-1","","0","","1","","2","","3","","4","","5"))+
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(NA,0), xlim=c(0,3))+
  scale_color_manual(breaks = sizes,
                     values = hue_pal()(length(sizes)))+
  scale_fill_manual(breaks = sizes,
                    values = hue_pal()(length(sizes)))+
  theme_light()+theme(strip.text.x = element_text(size = 8),
                      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
                      axis.title.y = element_blank(),
                      plot.title = element_text(size=12, hjust=0.5))
}

plot.PAP <-
  trophic_depth_plots(posts.PAP) + ggtitle("PAP Epoch 3")
plot.OSP <-
  trophic_depth_plots(posts.OSP) + ggtitle("Station Papa")
plot.ALOHAS <-
  trophic_depth_plots(posts.ALOHAS) + ggtitle("ALOHA Summer")
plot.ALOHAW <-
  trophic_depth_plots(posts.ALOHAW) + ggtitle("ALOHA Winter")
# plot.8N <-
#   trophic_depth_plots(posts.8N) + ggtitle("8 N")
# plot.5N <-
#   trophic_depth_plots(posts.5N) + ggtitle("5 N")

plot.blank <-
  ggplot+geom_blank()+theme_bw()+theme(panel.border=element_blank())

ggarrange(
  ggplot() + geom_blank() + ylab("Depth (m)"),

ggarrange(plot.OSP,    plot.PAP,
          plot.ALOHAS, plot.ALOHAW,
          #plot.5N,     plot.8N,
          ncol = 2, nrow=2,
          common.legend = FALSE, legend="right"),

  ggplot() + geom_blank() + theme_void(),
  ggplot() + geom_blank() + xlab("Trophic Parameters"),
  widths = c(0.04,1),
  heights = c(1,0.05)
)
```
Next we're going to make depth profiles, comparing the mixing model results at all five locations.

```{r trophic_depth_profiles_1-2, DPI = 300, fig.width=8.5, fig.asp=0.4, warning=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
# # Because submicron particles were not collected at 5N and 8N, we will make a
# # column call "Small" which we can compare to mixing model resuls from
# # other location where small and submicron particles are pooled.
# posts.5N$trophic$mode$Small <- posts.5N$trophic$mode$Small
# posts.8N$trophic$mode$Small <- posts.8N$trophic$mode$Small
# posts.5N$trophic$HDI95$Small <- posts.5N$trophic$HDI95$Small
# posts.8N$trophic$HDI95$Small <- posts.8N$trophic$HDI95$Small
# posts.5N$trophic$HDI90$Small <- posts.5N$trophic$HDI90$Small
# posts.8N$trophic$HDI90$Small <- posts.8N$trophic$HDI90$Small
# posts.5N$trophic$HDI75$Small <- posts.5N$trophic$HDI75$Small
# posts.8N$trophic$HDI75$Small <- posts.8N$trophic$HDI75$Small
# posts.5N$trophic$HDI50$Small <- posts.5N$trophic$HDI50$Small
# posts.8N$trophic$HDI50$Small <- posts.8N$trophic$HDI50$Small

# Making master data frames including all locations
# Also putting those into long format for plotting
trophic.mode <- 
  subset(
    bind_rows(
    posts.5N$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.8N$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAS$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAW$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.OSP$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.PAP$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")]),
    Size == "1-2 mm")
trophic.mode.long <-
  melt(trophic.mode,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "value")
trophic.HDI95 <- 
  subset(
    bind_rows(
    posts.5N$trophic$HDI95[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.8N$trophic$HDI95[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAS$trophic$HDI95[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAW$trophic$HDI95[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.OSP$trophic$HDI95[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.PAP$trophic$HDI95[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")]),
    Size == "1-2 mm")
trophic.HDI95.long <-
  melt(trophic.HDI95,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "value")
trophic.HDI90 <- 
  subset(
    bind_rows(
    posts.5N$trophic$HDI90[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.8N$trophic$HDI90[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAS$trophic$HDI90[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAW$trophic$HDI90[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.OSP$trophic$HDI90[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.PAP$trophic$HDI90[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")]),
    Size == "1-2 mm")
trophic.HDI90.long <-
  melt(trophic.HDI90,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "value")
trophic.HDI75 <- 
  subset(
    bind_rows(
    posts.5N$trophic$HDI75[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.8N$trophic$HDI75[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAS$trophic$HDI75[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAW$trophic$HDI75[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.OSP$trophic$HDI75[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.PAP$trophic$HDI75[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")]),
    Size == "1-2 mm")
trophic.HDI75.long <-
  melt(trophic.HDI75,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "value")
trophic.HDI50 <- 
  subset(
    bind_rows(
    posts.5N$trophic$HDI50[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.8N$trophic$HDI50[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAS$trophic$HDI50[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAW$trophic$HDI50[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.OSP$trophic$HDI50[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.PAP$trophic$HDI50[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")]),
    Size == "1-2 mm")
trophic.HDI50.long <-
  melt(trophic.HDI50,
       id.vars = c(variables),
       variable.name = "Source",
       value.name = "value")

# Appending columns with the min and max of the 95% HDI to the mode data frame.
trophic.mode.long$min95 <- trophic.HDI95.long$value[seq(1,nrow(trophic.HDI95.long),2)]
trophic.mode.long$max95 <- trophic.HDI95.long$value[seq(2,nrow(trophic.HDI95.long),2)]

ggplot()+
  geom_colh(data = trophic.mode.long,
            aes(x=value, y=Depth, fill=Source),
            position = "dodgev", width = 90, color = "black")+
  geom_errorbarh(data = trophic.mode.long,
                 aes(x=value, y=Depth, fill=Source,
                     xmin = min95, xmax = max95),
                 height=0,
                 position = position_dodgev(height=90))+
labs(color= "Organic Matter Source")+
  facet_wrap(~ Location, nrow=1)+
  scale_y_reverse(breaks = c(0,200,500,1000,1500), minor_breaks = c())+
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(1500,0))+
  theme_light()
  
ggplot()+
  geom_path(
    data=trophic.mode.long,
    aes(x = value, y=Depth, color=Location),
    size = 1, alpha = 1,
    position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  geom_line(
    data = trophic.HDI95.long,
    aes(x = value, y = Depth, group = interaction(Depth, Location), 
        color = Location),
    alpha = 0.2, size = 1,
    position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  geom_line(
    data = trophic.HDI90.long,
    aes(x = value, y = Depth, group = interaction(Depth, Location), 
        color = Location),
    alpha = 0.2, size = 1.5,
    position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  geom_line(
    data = trophic.HDI75.long,
    aes(x = value, y = Depth, group = interaction(Depth, Location), 
        color = Location),
    alpha = 0.3, size = 2,
    position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  geom_line(
    data = trophic.HDI50.long,
    aes(x = value, y = Depth, group = interaction(Depth, Location), 
        color = Location),
    alpha = 0.5, size = 3,
    position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  geom_point(
    data=trophic.mode.long,
    aes(x = value, y=Depth, fill=Location),
    size = 2.5, shape = 22,
    position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
  labs(color= "Location")+
  facet_wrap(~ Source, nrow=1)+
  scale_y_reverse(breaks = c(0,200,500,1000,1500), minor_breaks = c())+
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(1500,0))+
  theme_light()

```

```{r Linear_Models_1-2_trophic, dpi=300, fig.width=8, fig.asp=0.6}

trophic.mode <- 
  subset(
  bind_rows(
    posts.5N$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.8N$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAS$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAW$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.OSP$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.PAP$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")]),
  Size == "0.2-0.5 mm" | Size == "1-2 mm" | Size == "2-5 mm" | Size == ">5 mm")

print("===== FWL =====")

ggplot(
  data = trophic.mode,
  aes(x = Depth, y = FWL, color = Location, fill = Location))+
  geom_smooth(
    method = "lm", se = FALSE, lty = 2)+
  geom_smooth(
    method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "black", fill = "grey50")+
  geom_point(
    size = 3, shape = 21, color = "black")+
  ggtitle("FWL")

LM <- lm(FWL ~ Location + Depth + Location:Depth,
         data = trophic.mode
)
print("----- SUMMARY -----")
summary(LM)
print("----- ANOVA -----")
anova(LM)
plot(allEffects(LM))

LM <- lm(FWL ~ Depth,
         data = trophic.mode
)
print("----- SUMMARY -----")
summary(LM)
print("----- ANOVA -----")
anova(LM)
plot(allEffects(LM))

print("===== MTS =====")
ggplot(
  data = trophic.mode,
  aes(x = Depth, y = MTS, color = Location, fill = Location))+
  geom_smooth(
    method = "lm", se = FALSE, lty = 2)+
  geom_smooth(
    method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "black", fill = "grey50")+
  geom_point(
    size = 3, shape = 21, color = "black")+
  ggtitle("MTS")

LM <- lm(MTS ~ Depth * Location,
         data = trophic.mode
)
print("----- SUMMARY -----")
summary(LM)
print("----- ANOVA -----")
anova(LM)
plot(allEffects(LM))

print("===== PTS =====")
ggplot(
  data = trophic.mode,
  aes(x = Depth, y = PTS, color = Location, fill = Location))+
  geom_smooth(
    method = "lm", se = FALSE, lty = 2)+
  geom_smooth(
    method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "black", fill = "grey50")+
  geom_point(
    size = 3, shape = 21, color = "black")+
  ggtitle("PTS")

LM <- lm(PTS ~ Depth * Location,
         data = trophic.mode
)
print("----- SUMMARY -----")
summary(LM)
print("----- ANOVA -----")
anova(LM)
plot(allEffects(LM))

```

# f(surface) vs FWL in specific taxa

Next thing we'll do is make a quick plot of f(surface) vs FWL for all the samples of specific taxa to see how we can summarize those two OMSM outputs.

```{r fsurf-vs-trophic, dpi = 300, fig.width=7, fig.height=4}

f.mode <-
  subset(
  bind_rows(
    posts.5N$f$mode[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.8N$f$mode[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.ALOHAS$f$mode[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.ALOHAW$f$mode[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.OSP$f$mode[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
    posts.PAP$f$mode[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")]),
  Size != "0.06-0.2 mm" & Size != "0.2-0.5 mm" & Size != "1-2 mm" & Size != "2-5 mm" & Size != ">5 mm")# & Location == i)

trophic.mode <-
  subset(
  bind_rows(
    posts.5N$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.8N$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAS$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.ALOHAW$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.OSP$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")],
    posts.PAP$trophic$mode[c(variables,"PTS","MTS","FWL")]),
  Size != "0.06-0.2 mm" & Size != "0.2-0.5 mm" & Size != "1-2 mm" & Size != "2-5 mm" & Size != ">5 mm")# & Location == i)
base.mode <- 
  subset(
  bind_rows(
    posts.5N$base$mode[c(variables,"d15NAla","d15NPhe")],
    posts.8N$base$mode[c(variables,"d15NAla","d15NPhe")],
    posts.ALOHAS$base$mode[c(variables,"d15NAla","d15NPhe")],
    posts.ALOHAW$base$mode[c(variables,"d15NAla","d15NPhe")],
    posts.OSP$base$mode[c(variables,"d15NAla","d15NPhe")],
    posts.PAP$base$mode[c(variables,"d15NAla","d15NPhe")]),
  Size != "0.06-0.2 mm" & Size != "0.2-0.5 mm" & Size != "1-2 mm" & Size != "2-5 mm" & Size != ">5 mm")# & Location == i)
trophic.mode$baseTP <- (base.mode$d15NAla - base.mode$d15NPhe - 3.2) / 6.3 + 1

ftrophic.mode <- cbind(
  f.mode, trophic.mode[c("FWL","PTS","MTS","baseTP")]
)

library(ggforce)
hulls <- ftrophic.mode %>%
  group_by(Size) %>%
  slice(chull(Surface, baseTP+FWL))


ggplot(
  data = ftrophic.mode,
  aes(y = baseTP+FWL, x = Surface, fill = Size, shape = Location, group = Size)
)+
  # geom_polygon(aes(group = Size), color = NA, alpha = 0.5)+
  geom_shape(data = hulls, 
             alpha = 0.5, expand = 0.03, radius = 0.03)+
  geom_point(size = 3)+
  # geom_shape(data = hulls, 
  #            aes(y = baseTP),
  #            alpha = 0.2, expand = 0.03, radius = 0.03)+
  # geom_point(aes(y = baseTP), size = 3, alpha = 0.5)+
  # stat_ellipse(aes(group = Size, fill = Size), alpha = 0.5,
  #              level = 0.5, type = "norm", geom = "polygon")+
  # geom_mark_hull(aes(group = Size, fill = Size), expand=0)+
  
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(21,22,23,24,21,22,23,24,21,22,23,24))+
  # xlim(0,1)+ 
  ylim(2,5)+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0,0.5,1), limits = c(0,1))+
  ylab("modelled TP")+
  xlab("f(surface)")+
  theme(legend.box = "horizontal")
  # facet_wrap(~ Location)

```

# OSP/PAP Focused Depth Profiles {-}

We really only need to communicate size class distinctions at Station Papa and in the North Atlantic, so let's make a quick composite plot summarizing thos results.

```{r OSP-PAP_depth_profiles, DPI = 300, fig.width=8, fig.height=8, cache=FALSE}

sizes <- c("0.06-0.2 mm", "0.2-0.5 mm", "1-2 mm", "2-5 mm", ">5 mm",
           "Oithonid", "Harpactacoid", "Pleuromamma", "Peuromamma", "Ostracod", "Oncaeid", "Gaussia", "Chaetognath","Radiolarian", "Metridia", "Neocalanus","Gaetanus")

f_depth_plots <- function(
    posts
){
  f.mode <- 
    subset(
      posts$f$mode[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
      Size == "0.2-0.5 mm" | Size == "1-2 mm" | Size == "2-5 mm" | Size == ">5 mm")# & Location == i)
  f.mode.long <-
    melt(f.mode,
         id.vars = c(variables),
         variable.name = "Source",
         value.name = "f")
  f.mode.long$Size <- factor(f.mode.long$Size, levels = sizes)
  f.HDI95 <- 
    subset(
      posts$f$HDI95[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
      Size == "0.2-0.5 mm" | Size == "1-2 mm" | Size == "2-5 mm" | Size == ">5 mm")# & Location == i)
  f.HDI95.long <-
    melt(f.HDI95,
         id.vars = c(variables),
         variable.name = "Source",
         value.name = "f")
  f.HDI95.long$Size <- factor(f.HDI95.long$Size, levels = sizes)
  f.HDI90 <- 
    subset(
      posts$f$HDI90[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
      Size == "0.2-0.5 mm" | Size == "1-2 mm" | Size == "2-5 mm" | Size == ">5 mm")# & Location == i)
  f.HDI90.long <-
    melt(f.HDI90,
         id.vars = c(variables),
         variable.name = "Source",
         value.name = "f")
  f.HDI90.long$Size <- factor(f.HDI90.long$Size, levels = sizes)
  f.HDI75 <- 
    subset(
      posts$f$HDI75[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
      Size == "0.2-0.5 mm" | Size == "1-2 mm" | Size == "2-5 mm" | Size == ">5 mm")# & Location == i)
  f.HDI75.long <-
    melt(f.HDI75,
         id.vars = c(variables),
         variable.name = "Source",
         value.name = "f")
  f.HDI75.long$Size <- factor(f.HDI75.long$Size, levels = sizes)
  f.HDI50 <- 
    subset(
      posts$f$HDI50[c(variables,"Surface","Large","Small")],
      Size == "0.2-0.5 mm" | Size == "1-2 mm" | Size == "2-5 mm" | Size == ">5 mm")# & Location == i)
  f.HDI50.long <-
    melt(f.HDI50,
         id.vars = c(variables),
         variable.name = "Source",
         value.name = "f")
  f.HDI50.long$Size <- factor(f.HDI50.long$Size, levels = sizes)
  
  # Appending columns with the min and max of the 95% HDI to the mode data frame.
  f.mode.long$min95 <- f.HDI95.long$f[seq(1,nrow(f.HDI95.long),2)]
  f.mode.long$max95 <- f.HDI95.long$f[seq(2,nrow(f.HDI95.long),2)]
  
  sizes <- c("0.2-0.5 mm", "1-2 mm", "2-5 mm", ">5 mm")
  
  # print(
  ggplot()+
    # geom_path(
    #   data=f.mode.long,
    #   aes(x=f, y=Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Size)),
    #   size = 1, alpha = 1,
    #   position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
    geom_line(
      data = f.HDI95.long,
      aes(x = f, y = Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
      alpha = 0.5, size = 1,
      position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
    geom_line(
      data = f.HDI90.long,
      aes(x = f, y = Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
      alpha = 0.7, size = 1.5,
      position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
    geom_line(
      data = f.HDI75.long,
      aes(x = f, y = Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
      alpha = 1, size = 2,
      position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
    geom_line(
      data = f.HDI50.long,
      aes(x = f, y = Depth, color = Size, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
      alpha = 1, size = 3,
      position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
    geom_point(
      data=f.mode.long,
      aes(x=f, y=Depth, fill = Size, group = interaction(Depth, Size)),
      size = 2.5, shape = 22,
      position = position_dodgev(height = 100))+
    labs()+
    facet_wrap(~ Source)+
    # facet_wrap(~ Source, nrow = 1)+
    scale_y_reverse(breaks = c(0,250,500,750,1000,1250,1500), minor_breaks = c())+
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0,0.5,1), labels = c("0","0.5","1"), limits = c(0,1))+
    coord_cartesian(ylim=c(NA,0))+
    scale_color_manual(breaks = sizes,
```
